title: Agent Plugin Manifest
description: Machine-readable schema for plugin.json in Agent Plugin 1.0.0. The Agent Plugin specification defines additional semantic and operational requirements.

$schema.description: Canonical identifier of the plugin manifest schema for the Agent Plugin version targeted by this document.

name.description: Plugin identifier name; constrained per §5.5 of the Open Plugin specification.

displayName.description: Optional human-readable display label for host user interfaces. Not constrained by the §5.5 name rules. Hosts MAY use this instead of `name`; if it is absent or empty, hosts use `name`. See §5.7.

icon.description: Optional plugin-relative path (per §4.1: begins with './' and resolves within the plugin root) to an image representing the plugin in host user interfaces. Advisory: hosts MUST ignore an `icon` that is not a valid in-root plugin-relative path and MUST NOT retrieve a remote resource to resolve it. See §5.8.

extensions.description: Client-specific manifest data keyed by reverse-domain extension namespace. Agent Plugin assigns no semantics to namespace object contents.
